prompt: A wide cinematic aerial view of a vast snowy mountain landscape with many hills, ridges, and valleys. Several skiers are descending the slopes from higher elevations. Each skier leaves a distinct winding trail carved into the snow as they navigate downhill step by step. One skier has stopped in a small shallow valley partway down the mountain, while another skier continues further down toward a deeper valley below. In the distance, another skier reaches the lowest valley surrounded by tall snow-covered slopes. The terrain clearly shows multiple local valleys and one deepest valley. Bright winter sunlight, long shadows across the snow, realistic photography style, highly detailed snow textures, natural ski tracks visible, no text or symbols anywhere in the scene.
metaphor: Skiers descend a snowy mountain following the steepest slope, sometimes getting trapped in shallow local valleys, while the optimal path leads to the deepest valley below.
